---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new diagram, documentation section, or implementation scope item
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, concise description of what you'd like added or changed.

## Category

- [ ] Paper content (new section, expanded analysis)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] Diagram (`diagrams/`)
- [ ] Implementation scope (`implementation/` — see the roadmap in
      `CHANGELOG.md` first to check if this is already planned)
- [ ] Repository tooling (`scripts/`, CI, templates)
- [ ] Other

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What gap does it fill relative to the paper's current
scope (see the Discussion/Conclusion sections of `paper/paper.tex` and
the research roadmap in `CHANGELOG.md`)?

## Proposed Approach

If you have a specific implementation or content approach in mind,
describe it here. For documentation/paper changes, include any sources
that would support the addition.

## Are You Willing to Contribute This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting it
